name: SRE Incident Response Pack
description: Bundles the incident triage prompt and runbook generator skill so on-call engineers have a complete first-response toolkit. Covers the first 30 minutes of any incident.
author: ai-skills-maintainer

delivery_modes.instructions: During an incident, paste the incident-triage prompt into Copilot Chat with the alert details. Use runbook-generator to create a runbook if one does not exist.
POST to the portal API. The portal will route to the correct skill based on the 'skill_id' field.
Expose as an MCP tool callable from a PagerDuty or Slack bot integration.
Deploy as a Copilot Studio skill reachable from the incident management Teams channel.
Deploy via internal API layer for on-premises SRE tooling where external LLM calls are restricted.

configuration.additional_notes: Very low temperature for deterministic, consistent incident guidance. Increase only when generating runbook prose sections.

changelog.notes: Initial package with runbook generator, incident triage prompt, and shared utility skills.
